headlines.description: Tottenham captain Son Heung-Min's brace earned his side a 2-2 draw at Arsenal as the visitors twice came from behind in a thrilling north London derby on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Son double helps Spurs rally to draw at Arsenal

events.name: AFC Bournemouth at Brighton & Hove Albion

headlines.description: Substitute Kaoru Mitoma made an instant impact off the bench as Brighton came from behind to beat Bournemouth 3-1 in their Premier League clash at the Amex Stadium on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mitoma brace inspires Brighton to comeback win

headlines.description: A 73rd-minute strike by Ollie Watkins earned Aston Villa all three points at goal-starved, 10-man Chelsea in the Premier League on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chelsea woes continue with 1-0 loss to Villa

headlines.description: Liverpool striker Darwin Nunez netted a brilliant goal as his side romped to a 3-1 Premier League win over a dogged West Ham United side at Anfield on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Nunez on form as Liverpool overcome West Ham

headlines.description: Newcastle United ruthlessly beat Sheffield United with a dazzling 8-0 victory at Bramall Lane on Sunday, with eight different players scoring to leave the home side bottom of the Premier League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Eight score for Newcastle in Sheff Utd drubbing
